verses.latin_vulgate: Profectique inde, venimus in solitudinem, quæ ducit ad mare Rubrum, sicut mihi dixerat Dominus : et circuivimus montem Seir longo tempore.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַנֵּ֜פֶן וַנִּסַּ֤ע הַמִּדְבָּ֙רָה֙ דֶּ֣רֶךְ יַם־ס֔וּף כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר דִּבֶּ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה אֵלָ֑י וַנָּ֥סׇב אֶת־הַר־שֵׂעִ֖יר יָמִ֥ים רַבִּֽים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And departing from thence we came into the wilderness that leadeth to the Red Sea, as the Lord had spoken to me: and we compassed mount Seir a long time.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin me palasimme ja matkustimme korpeen Punaisen meren tietä, niinkuin Herra minulle sanonut oli, ja vaelsimme Seirin vuorta ympäri kauvan aikaa.
verses.king_james: Then we turned, and took our journey into the wilderness by the way of the Red sea, as the Lord spake unto me: and we compassed mount Seir many days.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Dominus ad me :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֥אמֶר יְהֹוָ֖ה אֵלַ֥י לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to me:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra puhui minulle, sanoen:
verses.king_james: And the Lord spake unto me, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Sufficit vobis circuire montem istum : ite contra aquilonem :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַב־לָכֶ֕ם סֹ֖ב אֶת־הָהָ֣ר הַזֶּ֑ה פְּנ֥וּ לָכֶ֖ם צָפֹֽנָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: You have compassed this mountain long enough: go toward the north:
verses.finnish_biblia: Jo te olette kyllä vaeltaneet tätä vuorta ympäri, palatkaat pohjoiseen päin.
verses.king_james: Ye have compassed this mountain long enough: turn you northward.

verses.latin_vulgate: et populo præcipe, dicens : Transibitis per terminos fratrum vestrorum filiorum Esau, qui habitant in Seir, et timebunt vos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הָעָם֮ צַ֣ו לֵאמֹר֒ אַתֶּ֣ם עֹֽבְרִ֗ים בִּגְבוּל֙ אֲחֵיכֶ֣ם בְּנֵי־עֵשָׂ֔ו הַיֹּשְׁבִ֖ים בְּשֵׂעִ֑יר וְיִֽירְא֣וּ מִכֶּ֔ם וְנִשְׁמַרְתֶּ֖ם מְאֹֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And command thou the people, saying: You shall pass by the borders of your brethren the children of Esau, who dwell in Seir, and they will be afraid of you.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja käski kansalle, sanoen: teidän pitää vaeltaman teidän veljenne Esaun lasten rajain ylitse, jotka Seirissä asuvat, ja he pelkäävät teitä; mutta karttakaat teitänne sangen visusti.
verses.king_james: And command thou the people, saying, Ye are to pass through the coast of your brethren the children of Esau, which dwell in Seir; and they shall be afraid of you: take ye good heed unto yourselves therefore:

verses.latin_vulgate: Videte ergo diligenter ne moveamini contra eos. Neque enim dabo vobis de terra eorum quantum potest unius pedis calcare vestigium, quia in possessionem Esau dedi montem Seir.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַל־תִּתְגָּר֣וּ בָ֔ם כִּ֠י לֹֽא־אֶתֵּ֤ן לָכֶם֙ מֵֽאַרְצָ֔ם עַ֖ד מִדְרַ֣ךְ כַּף־רָ֑גֶל כִּֽי־יְרֻשָּׁ֣ה לְעֵשָׂ֔ו נָתַ֖תִּי אֶת־הַ֥ר שֵׂעִֽיר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Take ye then good heed that you stir not against them. For I will not give you of their land so much as the step of one foot can tread upon, because I have given mount Seir to Esau, for a possession.
verses.finnish_biblia: Älkäät alkako sotaa heitä vastaan; sillä en minä anna teille jalankaan leveyttä heidän maastansa; sillä Esaun lapsille olen minä antanut Seirin vuoren perimiseksi.
verses.king_james: Meddle not with them; for I will not give you of their land, no, not so much as a foot breadth; because I have given mount Seir unto Esau for a possession.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cibos emetis ab eis pecunia, et comedetis : aquam emptam haurietis, et bibetis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֹ֣כֶל תִּשְׁבְּר֧וּ מֵֽאִתָּ֛ם בַּכֶּ֖סֶף וַאֲכַלְתֶּ֑ם וְגַם־מַ֜יִם תִּכְר֧וּ מֵאִתָּ֛ם בַּכֶּ֖סֶף וּשְׁתִיתֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: You shall buy meats of them for money and shall eat: you shall draw waters for money, and shall drink.
verses.finnish_biblia: Rahalla pitää teidän heiltä ruuan ostaman, jonka te syötte, niin myös veden pitää teidän heiltä rahalla ostaman, jota te juotte:
verses.king_james: Ye shall buy meat of them for money, that ye may eat; and ye shall also buy water of them for money, that ye may drink.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus Deus tuus benedixit tibi in omni opere manuum tuarum : novit iter tuum, quomodo transieris solitudinem hanc magnam, per quadraginta annos habitans tecum Dominus Deus tuus, et nihil tibi defuit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי֩ יְהֹוָ֨ה אֱלֹהֶ֜יךָ בֵּֽרַכְךָ֗ בְּכֹל֙ מַעֲשֵׂ֣ה יָדֶ֔ךָ יָדַ֣ע לֶכְתְּךָ֔ אֶת־הַמִּדְבָּ֥ר הַגָּדֹ֖ל הַזֶּ֑ה זֶ֣ה ׀ אַרְבָּעִ֣ים שָׁנָ֗ה יְהֹוָ֤ה אֱלֹהֶ֙יךָ֙ עִמָּ֔ךְ לֹ֥א חָסַ֖רְתָּ דָּבָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord thy God hath blessed thee in every work of thy hands: the Lord thy God dwelling with thee, knoweth thy journey, how thou hast passed through this great wilderness, for forty years, and thou hast wanted nothing.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Herra sinun Jumalas on siunannut sinun, kaikissa sinun kättes töissä, hän tietää sinun matkustukses tässä suuressa korvessa. Jo neljäkymmentä ajastaikaa on Herra sinun Jumalas ollut sinun kanssas, niin ettei sinulta mitäkään ole puuttunut.
verses.king_james: For the Lord thy God hath blessed thee in all the works of thy hand: he knoweth thy walking through this great wilderness: these forty years the Lord thy God hath been with thee; thou hast lacked nothing.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque transissemus fratres nostros filios Esau, qui habitabant in Seir, per viam campestrem de Elath, et de Asiongaber, venimus ad iter quod ducit in desertum Moab.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽנַּעֲבֹ֞ר מֵאֵ֧ת אַחֵ֣ינוּ בְנֵי־עֵשָׂ֗ו הַיֹּֽשְׁבִים֙ בְּשֵׂעִ֔יר מִדֶּ֙רֶךְ֙ הָֽעֲרָבָ֔ה מֵאֵילַ֖ת וּמֵעֶצְיֹ֣ן גָּ֑בֶר {ס} וַנֵּ֙פֶן֙ וַֽנַּעֲבֹ֔ר דֶּ֖רֶךְ מִדְבַּ֥ר מוֹאָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when we had passed by our brethren the children of Esau, that dwelt in Seir, by the way of the plain from Elath and from Asiongaber, we came to the way that leadeth to the desert of Moab.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin me veljemme Esaun lasten tyköä vaeltaneet olimme, jotka Seirin vuorella asuivat, sitä kedon tietä Elatista ja Etseongeberistä, niin palasimme me, ja menimme Moabin korven tietä.
verses.king_james: And when we passed by from our brethren the children of Esau, which dwelt in Seir, through the way of the plain from Elath, and from Ezion–gaber, we turned and passed by the way of the wilderness of Moab.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Dominus ad me : Non pugnes contra Moabitas, nec ineas adversus eos prælium : non enim dabo tibi quidquam de terra eorum, quia filiis Loth tradidi Ar in possessionem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר יְהֹוָ֜ה אֵלַ֗י אַל־תָּ֙צַר֙ אֶת־מוֹאָ֔ב וְאַל־תִּתְגָּ֥ר בָּ֖ם מִלְחָמָ֑ה כִּ֠י לֹֽא־אֶתֵּ֨ן לְךָ֤ מֵֽאַרְצוֹ֙ יְרֻשָּׁ֔ה כִּ֣י לִבְנֵי־ל֔וֹט נָתַ֥תִּי אֶת־עָ֖ר יְרֻשָּֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to me: Fight not against the Moabites, neither go to battle against them: for I will not give thee any of their land, because I have given Ar to the children of Lot in possession.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra sanoi minulle: älä vahingoitse Moabilaisia, älä myös sekoita itsiäs sotaan heidän kanssansa; silä en minä anna sinulle mitäkään hänen maastansa perimiseksi; sillä Lotin lapsille olen minä antanut Arin perimiseksi.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto me, Distress not the Moabites, neither contend with them in battle: for I will not give thee of their land for a possession; because I have given Ar unto the children of Lot for a possession.

verses.latin_vulgate: Emim primi fuerunt habitatores ejus, populus magnus, et validus, et tam excelsus ut de Enacim stirpe,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָאֵמִ֥ים לְפָנִ֖ים יָ֣שְׁבוּ בָ֑הּ עַ֣ם גָּד֥וֹל וְרַ֛ב וָרָ֖ם כָּעֲנָקִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Emims first were the inhabitants thereof, a people great, and strong, and so tall, that like the race of the Enacims,
verses.finnish_biblia: Emiläiset ovat muinen sillä paikalla asuneet, jotka olivat suuri, väkevä ja pitkä kansa, niinkuin Enakilaiset;
verses.king_james: The Emims dwelt therein in times past, a people great, and many, and tall, as the Anakims;

verses.latin_vulgate: quasi gigantes crederentur, et essent similes filiorum Enacim. Denique Moabitæ appellant eos Emim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רְפָאִ֛ים יֵחָשְׁב֥וּ אַף־הֵ֖ם כָּעֲנָקִ֑ים וְהַמֹּ֣אָבִ֔ים יִקְרְא֥וּ לָהֶ֖ם אֵמִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: They were esteemed as giants, and were like the sons of the Enacims. But the Moabites call them Emims.
verses.finnish_biblia: He luultiin myös Refalaisiksi, niinkuin Enakilaiset, ja Moabilaiset kutsuivat heitä Emiläisiksi.
verses.king_james: Which also were accounted giants, as the Anakims; but the Moabites call them Emims.

verses.latin_vulgate: In Seir autem prius habitaverunt Horrhæi : quibus expulsis atque deletis, habitaverunt filii Esau, sicut fecit Israël in terra possessionis suæ, quam dedit illi Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְשֵׂעִ֞יר יָשְׁב֣וּ הַחֹרִים֮ לְפָנִים֒ וּבְנֵ֧י עֵשָׂ֣ו יִֽירָשׁ֗וּם וַיַּשְׁמִידוּם֙ מִפְּנֵיהֶ֔ם וַיֵּשְׁב֖וּ תַּחְתָּ֑ם כַּאֲשֶׁ֧ר עָשָׂ֣ה יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל לְאֶ֙רֶץ֙ יְרֻשָּׁת֔וֹ אֲשֶׁר־נָתַ֥ן יְהֹוָ֖ה לָהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Horrhites also formerly dwelt in Seir: who being driven out and destroyed, the children of Esau dwelt there, as Israel did in the land of his possession, which the Lord gave him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Asuivat myös muinen Horilaiset Seirissä, ja Esaun lapset ajoivat pois ja hukuttivat ne edestänsä, ja asuivat heidän siassansa: niinkuin Israel teki perintömaassansa, jonka Herra heille antoi.
verses.king_james: The Horims also dwelt in Seir beforetime; but the children of Esau succeeded them, when they had destroyed them from before them, and dwelt in their stead; as Israel did unto the land of his possession, which the Lord gave unto them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Surgentes ergo ut transiremus torrentem Zared, venimus ad eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַתָּ֗ה קֻ֛מוּ וְעִבְר֥וּ לָכֶ֖ם אֶת־נַ֣חַל זָ֑רֶד וַֽנַּעֲבֹ֖ר אֶת־נַ֥חַל זָֽרֶד׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then rising up to pass the torrent Zared, we came to it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin nouskaat nyt, ja matkustakaat Saredin ojan ylitse. Ja me vaelsimme Saredin ojan ylitse.
verses.king_james: Now rise up, said I, and get you over the brook Zered. And we went over the brook Zered.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tempus autem, quo ambulavimus de Cadesbarne usque ad transitum torrentis Zared, triginta et octo annorum fuit : donec consumeretur omnis generatio hominum bellatorum de castris, sicut juraverat Dominus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַיָּמִ֞ים אֲשֶׁר־הָלַ֣כְנוּ ׀ מִקָּדֵ֣שׁ בַּרְנֵ֗עַ עַ֤ד אֲשֶׁר־עָבַ֙רְנוּ֙ אֶת־נַ֣חַל זֶ֔רֶד שְׁלֹשִׁ֥ים וּשְׁמֹנֶ֖ה שָׁנָ֑ה עַד־תֹּ֨ם כׇּל־הַדּ֜וֹר אַנְשֵׁ֤י הַמִּלְחָמָה֙ מִקֶּ֣רֶב הַֽמַּחֲנֶ֔ה כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר נִשְׁבַּ֥ע יְהֹוָ֖ה לָהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the time that we journeyed from Cadesbarne till we passed over the torrent Zared, was thirty-eight years: until all the generation of the men that were fit for war was consumed out of the camp, as the Lord had sworn:
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan aika, kuin me matkustimme KadesBarneasta, siihen asti kuin me tulimme Saredin ojan ylitse, oli kahdeksan vuotta neljättäkymmentä, siihenasti kuin kaikki sotamiehet leirissä olivat hukkuneet, niinkuin Herra heille vannonut oli.
verses.king_james: And the space in which we came from Kadesh–barnea, until we were come over the brook Zered, was thirty and eight years; until all the generation of the men of war were wasted out from among the host, as the Lord sware unto them.

verses.latin_vulgate: cujus manus fuit adversum eos, ut interirent de castrorum medio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגַ֤ם יַד־יְהֹוָה֙ הָ֣יְתָה בָּ֔ם לְהֻמָּ֖ם מִקֶּ֣רֶב הַֽמַּחֲנֶ֑ה עַ֖ד תֻּמָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: For his hand was against them, that they should perish from the midst of the camp.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Herran käsi oli heitä vastaan, hukuttamaan heitä leirissä, siihenasti kuin hän peräti lopetti heidät.
verses.king_james: For indeed the hand of the Lord was against them, to destroy them from among the host, until they were consumed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Postquam autem universi ceciderunt pugnatores,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֨י כַאֲשֶׁר־תַּ֜מּוּ כׇּל־אַנְשֵׁ֧י הַמִּלְחָמָ֛ה לָמ֖וּת מִקֶּ֥רֶב הָעָֽם׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And after all the fighting men were dead,
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin kaikki sotamiehet olivat loppuneet ja kuolleet kansan seasta,
verses.king_james: So it came to pass, when all the men of war were consumed and dead from among the people,

verses.latin_vulgate: locutus est Dominus ad me, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה אֵלַ֥י לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord spoke to me, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Puhui Herra minulle, ja sanoi:
verses.king_james: That the Lord spake unto me, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu transibis hodie terminos Moab, urbem nomine Ar :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַתָּ֨ה עֹבֵ֥ר הַיּ֛וֹם אֶת־גְּב֥וּל מוֹאָ֖ב אֶת־עָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou shalt pass this day the borders of Moab, the city named Ar:
verses.finnish_biblia: Tänäpänä pitää sinun matkustaman Moabin rajain yli, lähellä Aria.
verses.king_james: Thou art to pass over through Ar, the coast of Moab, this day:

verses.latin_vulgate: et accedens in vicina filiorum Ammon, cave ne pugnes contra eos, nec movearis ad prælium : non enim dabo tibi de terra filiorum Ammon, quia filiis Loth dedi eam in possessionem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְקָרַבְתָּ֗ מ֚וּל בְּנֵ֣י עַמּ֔וֹן אַל־תְּצֻרֵ֖ם וְאַל־תִּתְגָּ֣ר בָּ֑ם כִּ֣י לֹֽא־אֶ֠תֵּ֠ן מֵאֶ֨רֶץ בְּנֵי־עַמּ֤וֹן לְךָ֙ יְרֻשָּׁ֔ה כִּ֥י לִבְנֵי־ל֖וֹט נְתַתִּ֥יהָ יְרֻשָּֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when thou comest nigh the frontiers of the children of Ammon, take heed thou fight not against them, nor once move to battle: for I will not give thee of the land of the children of Ammon, because I have given it to the children of Lot for a possession.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin lähestyt Ammonin lapsia, älä heitä vahingoitse, älä myös sekoita itsiäs sotaan heidän kanssansa; sillä en minä anna sinulle Ammonin lasten maata perimiseksi; vaan Lotin lapsille olen minä sen antanut perimiseksi.
verses.king_james: And when thou comest nigh over against the children of Ammon, distress them not, nor meddle with them: for I will not give thee of the land of the children of Ammon any possession; because I have given it unto the children of Lot for a possession.

verses.latin_vulgate: Terra gigantum reputata est : et in ipsa olim habitaverunt gigantes, quos Ammonitæ vocant Zomzommim,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶֽרֶץ־רְפָאִ֥ים תֵּחָשֵׁ֖ב אַף־הִ֑וא רְפָאִ֤ים יָֽשְׁבוּ־בָהּ֙ לְפָנִ֔ים וְהָֽעַמֹּנִ֔ים יִקְרְא֥וּ לָהֶ֖ם זַמְזֻמִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: It was accounted a land of giants: and giants formerly dwelt in it, whom the Ammonites call Zomzommims,
verses.finnish_biblia: Se on myös luettu Refalaisten maaksi; sillä Refalaiset ovat muinen siinä asuneet. Ja Ammonilaiset kutsuvat heidät Samsumilaisiksi.
verses.king_james: (That also was accounted a land of giants: giants dwelt therein in old time; and the Ammonites call them Zamzummims;

verses.latin_vulgate: populus magnus, et multus, et proceræ longitudinis, sicut Enacim, quos delevit Dominus a facie eorum : et fecit illos habitare pro eis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַ֣ם גָּד֥וֹל וְרַ֛ב וָרָ֖ם כָּעֲנָקִ֑ים וַיַּשְׁמִידֵ֤ם יְהֹוָה֙ מִפְּנֵיהֶ֔ם וַיִּירָשֻׁ֖ם וַיֵּשְׁב֥וּ תַחְתָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: A people great and many, and of tall stature, like the Enacims whom the Lord destroyed before their face: and he made them to dwell in their stead,
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä he olivat suuri, väkevä ja pitkä kansa, niinkuin Enakilaiset. Ja Herra hävitti heitä heidän edestänsä, niin että he ajoivat heidät ulos, ja asuivat heidän siassansa.
verses.king_james: A people great, and many, and tall, as the Anakims; but the Lord destroyed them before them; and they succeeded them, and dwelt in their stead:

verses.latin_vulgate: sicut fecerat filiis Esau, qui habitant in Seir, delens Horrhæos, et terram eorum illis tradens, quam possident usque in præsens.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כַּאֲשֶׁ֤ר עָשָׂה֙ לִבְנֵ֣י עֵשָׂ֔ו הַיֹּשְׁבִ֖ים בְּשֵׂעִ֑יר אֲשֶׁ֨ר הִשְׁמִ֤יד אֶת־הַחֹרִי֙ מִפְּנֵיהֶ֔ם וַיִּֽירָשֻׁם֙ וַיֵּשְׁב֣וּ תַחְתָּ֔ם עַ֖ד הַיּ֥וֹם הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: As he had done in favour of the children of Esau, that dwell in Seir, destroying the Horrhites, and delivering their land to them, which they possess to this day.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niinkuin hän oli tehnyt Esaun lapsille Seirin vuorella asuvaisille, hävittäissänsä Horilaiset heidän edestänsä, niin että he ovat heidät ajaneet ulos, ja asuneet heidän siassansa tähän päivään asti.
verses.king_james: As he did to the children of Esau, which dwelt in Seir, when he destroyed the Horims from before them; and they succeeded them, and dwelt in their stead even unto this day:

verses.latin_vulgate: Hevæos quoque, qui habitabant in Haserim usque Gazan, Cappadoces expulerunt : qui egressi de Cappadocia deleverunt eos, et habitaverunt pro illis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָֽעַוִּ֛ים הַיֹּשְׁבִ֥ים בַּחֲצֵרִ֖ים עַד־עַזָּ֑ה כַּפְתֹּרִים֙ הַיֹּצְאִ֣ים מִכַּפְתֹּ֔ר הִשְׁמִידֻ֖ם וַיֵּשְׁב֥וּ תַחְתָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Hevites also, that dwelt in Haserim as far as Gaza, were expelled by the Cappadocians: who came out of Cappadocia, and destroyed them and dwelt in their stead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Availaiset asuivat maakylissä Gatsaan asti; mutta Kaphtorilaiset läksivät Kaphtorista ja hävittivät ne, ja asuivat heidän siassansa.
verses.king_james: And the Avims which dwelt in Hazerim, even unto Azzah, the Caphtorims, which came forth out of Caphtor, destroyed them, and dwelt in their stead.)

verses.latin_vulgate: Surgite, et transite torrentem Arnon : ecce tradidi in manu tua Sehon regem Hesebon Amorrhæum, et terram ejus incipe possidere, et committe adversus eum prælium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ק֣וּמוּ סְּע֗וּ וְעִבְרוּ֮ אֶת־נַ֣חַל אַרְנֹן֒ רְאֵ֣ה נָתַ֣תִּי בְ֠יָדְךָ֠ אֶת־סִיחֹ֨ן מֶֽלֶךְ־חֶשְׁבּ֧וֹן הָֽאֱמֹרִ֛י וְאֶת־אַרְצ֖וֹ הָחֵ֣ל רָ֑שׁ וְהִתְגָּ֥ר בּ֖וֹ מִלְחָמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Arise ye, and pass the torrent Arnon: Behold I have delivered into thy hand Sehon king of Hesebon the Amorrhite, and begin thou to possess his land and make war against him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nouskaat ja lähtekäät, ja matkustakaat Arnonin ojan ylitse: katso, minä annoin sinun käsiis Sihonin Amorilaisten kuninkaan Hesbonissa, mainensa, rupee siis omistamaan, ja sotimaan häntä vastaan.
verses.king_james: Rise ye up, take your journey, and pass over the river Arnon: behold, I have given into thine hand Sihon the Amorite, king of Heshbon, and his land: begin to possess it, and contend with him in battle.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hodie incipiam mittere terrorem atque formidinem tuam in populos, qui habitant sub omni cælo : ut audito nomine tuo paveant, et in morem parturientium contremiscant, et dolore teneantur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַיּ֣וֹם הַזֶּ֗ה אָחֵל֙ תֵּ֤ת פַּחְדְּךָ֙ וְיִרְאָ֣תְךָ֔ עַל־פְּנֵי֙ הָֽעַמִּ֔ים תַּ֖חַת כׇּל־הַשָּׁמָ֑יִם אֲשֶׁ֤ר יִשְׁמְעוּן֙ שִׁמְעֲךָ֔ וְרָגְז֥וּ וְחָל֖וּ מִפָּנֶֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: This day will I begin to send the dread and fear of thee upon the nations that dwell under the whole heaven: that when they hear thy name they may fear and tremble, and be in pain like women in travail.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tänäpänä minä alan tuottamaan kaiken kansan päälle koko taivaan alla pelvon ja vapisemisen sinun edessäs, niin että he, sanoman sinusta kuultuansa, pitää värisemän, ja surulliset oleman sinun edessäs.
verses.king_james: This day will I begin to put the dread of thee and the fear of thee upon the nations that are under the whole heaven, who shall hear report of thee, and shall tremble, and be in anguish because of thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misi ergo nuntios de solitudine Cademoth ad Sehon regem Hesebon verbis pacificis, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֶשְׁלַ֤ח מַלְאָכִים֙ מִמִּדְבַּ֣ר קְדֵמ֔וֹת אֶל־סִיח֖וֹן מֶ֣לֶךְ חֶשְׁבּ֑וֹן דִּבְרֵ֥י שָׁל֖וֹם לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: So I sent messengers from the wilderness of Cademoth to Sehon the king of Hesebon with peaceable words, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin minä lähetin sanansaattajat Kedemotin korvesta Sihonille Hesbonin kuninkaalle rauhallisilla sanoilla, sanoen:
verses.king_james: And I sent messengers out of the wilderness of Kedemoth unto Sihon king of Heshbon with words of peace, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Transibimus per terram tuam : publica gradiemur via ; non declinabimus neque ad dexteram, neque ad sinistram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶעְבְּרָ֣ה בְאַרְצֶ֔ךָ בַּדֶּ֥רֶךְ בַּדֶּ֖רֶךְ אֵלֵ֑ךְ לֹ֥א אָס֖וּר יָמִ֥ין וּשְׂמֹֽאול׃
verses.douay_rheims: We will pass through thy land, we will go along by the highway: we will not turn aside neither to the right hand nor to the left.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä tahdon vaeltaa sinun maakuntais lävitse, ja niinkuin tie antaa, niin minä vaellan: en minä oikialle puolelle enkä vasemmalle poikkee.
verses.king_james: Let me pass through thy land: I will go along by the high way, I will neither turn unto the right hand nor to the left.

verses.latin_vulgate: Alimenta pretio vende nobis, ut vescamur : aquam pecunia tribue, et sic bibemus. Tantum est ut nobis concedas transitum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֹ֣כֶל בַּכֶּ֤סֶף תַּשְׁבִּרֵ֙נִי֙ וְאָכַ֔לְתִּי וּמַ֛יִם בַּכֶּ֥סֶף תִּתֶּן־לִ֖י וְשָׁתִ֑יתִי רַ֖ק אֶעְבְּרָ֥ה בְרַגְלָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Sell us meat for money, that we may eat: give us water for money and so we will drink. We only ask that thou wilt let us pass through,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ruokaa pitää sinun rahan edestä antaman minulle syödä, ja vettä rahan edestä juoda: minä käyn vaivoin joudukkaasti sen lävitse,
verses.king_james: Thou shalt sell me meat for money, that I may eat; and give me water for money, that I may drink: only I will pass through on my feet;

verses.latin_vulgate: sicut fecerunt filii Esau, qui habitant in Seir, et Moabitæ, qui morantur in Ar : donec veniamus ad Jordanem, et transeamus ad terram, quam Dominus Deus noster daturus est nobis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כַּאֲשֶׁ֨ר עָֽשׂוּ־לִ֜י בְּנֵ֣י עֵשָׂ֗ו הַיֹּֽשְׁבִים֙ בְּשֵׂעִ֔יר וְהַמּ֣וֹאָבִ֔ים הַיֹּשְׁבִ֖ים בְּעָ֑ר עַ֤ד אֲשֶֽׁר־אֶֽעֱבֹר֙ אֶת־הַיַּרְדֵּ֔ן אֶל־הָאָ֕רֶץ אֲשֶׁר־יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֵ֖ינוּ נֹתֵ֥ן לָֽנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: As the children of Esau have done, that dwell in Seir, and the Moabites, that abide in Ar: until we come to the Jordan, and pass to the land which the Lord our God will give us.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niinkuin Esaun lapset, jotka Seirissä asuvat, minulle tehneet ovat, ja Moabilaiset, jotka Arissa asuvat, siihenasti että minä tulen Jordanin ylitse, siihen maahan, jonka Herra meidän Jumalamme antaa meille.
verses.king_james: (As the children of Esau which dwell in Seir, and the Moabites which dwell in Ar, did unto me;) until I shall pass over Jordan into the land which the Lord our God giveth us.

verses.latin_vulgate: Noluitque Sehon rex Hesebon dare nobis transitum : quia induraverat Dominus Deus tuus spiritum ejus, et obfirmaverat cor illius, ut traderetur in manus tuas, sicut nunc vides.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹ֣א אָבָ֗ה סִיחֹן֙ מֶ֣לֶךְ חֶשְׁבּ֔וֹן הַעֲבִרֵ֖נוּ בּ֑וֹ כִּֽי־הִקְשָׁה֩ יְהֹוָ֨ה אֱלֹהֶ֜יךָ אֶת־רוּח֗וֹ וְאִמֵּץ֙ אֶת־לְבָב֔וֹ לְמַ֛עַן תִּתּ֥וֹ בְיָדְךָ֖ כַּיּ֥וֹם הַזֶּֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Sehon the king of Hesebon would not let us pass: because the Lord thy God had hardened his spirit, and fixed his heart, that he might be delivered into thy hands, as now thou seest.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan ei Sihon Hesbonin kuningas tahtonut meidän antaa vaeltaa sen lävitse; sillä Herra sinun Jumalas kovetti hänen mielensä ja paadutti hänen sydämensä, että Herra tahtoi antaa hänen sinun käsiis, niinkuin tänäpäivänä on.
verses.king_james: But Sihon king of Heshbon would not let us pass by him: for the Lord thy God hardened his spirit, and made his heart obstinate, that he might deliver him into thy hand, as appeareth this day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Dominus ad me : Ecce cœpi tibi tradere Sehon, et terram ejus : incipe possidere eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יְהֹוָה֙ אֵלַ֔י רְאֵ֗ה הַֽחִלֹּ֙תִי֙ תֵּ֣ת לְפָנֶ֔יךָ אֶת־סִיחֹ֖ן וְאֶת־אַרְצ֑וֹ הָחֵ֣ל רָ֔שׁ לָרֶ֖שֶׁת אֶת־אַרְצֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to me: Behold I have begun to deliver unto thee Sehon and his land, begin to possess it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra sanoi minulle: katso, minä olen ruvennut antamaan Sihonin kuninkaan ja hänen maansa sinun etees: rupee omistamaan ja perintönäs pitämään hänen maatansa.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto me, Behold, I have begun to give Sihon and his land before thee: begin to possess, that thou mayest inherit his land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egressusque est Sehon obviam nobis cum omni populo suo ad prælium in Jasa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּצֵא֩ סִיחֹ֨ן לִקְרָאתֵ֜נוּ ה֧וּא וְכׇל־עַמּ֛וֹ לַמִּלְחָמָ֖ה יָֽהְצָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Sehon came out to meet us with all his people to fight at Jasa.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Sihon läksi sotimaan meitä vastaan, hän ja kaikki hänen väkensä Jaksassa.
verses.king_james: Then Sihon came out against us, he and all his people, to fight at Jahaz.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et tradidit eum Dominus Deus noster nobis : percussimusque eum cum filiis suis et omni populo suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיִּתְּנֵ֛הוּ יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֵ֖ינוּ לְפָנֵ֑ינוּ וַנַּ֥ךְ אֹת֛וֹ וְאֶת־בָּנָ֖ו וְאֶת־כׇּל־עַמּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord our God delivered him to us: and we slew him with his sons and all his people.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Herra meidän Jumalamme antoi hänen meidän eteemme, ja me löimme hänen ja hänen lapsensa ja kaikki hänen väkensä.
verses.king_james: And the Lord our God delivered him before us; and we smote him, and his sons, and all his people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cunctasque urbes in tempore illo cepimus, interfectis habitatoribus earum, viris ac mulieribus et parvulis : non reliquimus in eis quidquam,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַנִּלְכֹּ֤ד אֶת־כׇּל־עָרָיו֙ בָּעֵ֣ת הַהִ֔וא וַֽנַּחֲרֵם֙ אֶת־כׇּל־עִ֣יר מְתִ֔ם וְהַנָּשִׁ֖ים וְהַטָּ֑ף לֹ֥א הִשְׁאַ֖רְנוּ שָׂרִֽיד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And we took all his cities at that time, killing the inhabitants of them, men and women and children. We left nothing of them:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja me otimme silloin kaikki hänen kaupunkinsa, ja hukutimme kaikki kaupungit, miehet ja vaimot ja lapset, niin ettemme yhtäkään jättäneet,
verses.king_james: And we took all his cities at that time, and utterly destroyed the men, and the women, and the little ones, of every city, we left none to remain:

verses.latin_vulgate: absque jumentis, quæ in partem venere prædantium : et spoliis urbium, quas cepimus
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַ֥ק הַבְּהֵמָ֖ה בָּזַ֣זְנוּ לָ֑נוּ וּשְׁלַ֥ל הֶעָרִ֖ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר לָכָֽדְנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Except the cattle which came to the share of them that took them: and the spoils of the cities, which we took:
verses.finnish_biblia: Paitsi eläimiä jotka me meillemme otimme, ja kaupunkein saaliin, jotka me voitimme,
verses.king_james: Only the cattle we took for a prey unto ourselves, and the spoil of the cities which we took.

verses.latin_vulgate: ab Aroër, quæ est super ripam torrentis Arnon, oppido quod in valle situm est, usque Galaad. Non fuit vicus et civitas, quæ nostras effugeret manus : omnes tradidit Dominus Deus noster nobis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֵֽעֲרֹעֵ֡ר אֲשֶׁר֩ עַל־שְׂפַת־נַ֨חַל אַרְנֹ֜ן וְהָעִ֨יר אֲשֶׁ֤ר בַּנַּ֙חַל֙ וְעַד־הַגִּלְעָ֔ד לֹ֤א הָֽיְתָה֙ קִרְיָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר שָׂגְבָ֖ה מִמֶּ֑נּוּ אֶת־הַכֹּ֕ל נָתַ֛ן יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֵ֖ינוּ לְפָנֵֽינוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: From Aroer, which is upon the bank of the torrent Arnon, a town that is situate in a valley, as far as Galaad. There was not a village or city, that escaped our hands: the Lord our God delivered all unto us:
verses.finnish_biblia: Hamasta Aroerista Arnonin ojan reunalla, ja siitä kaupungista ojan vieressä, niin Gileadiin asti. Ei yhtäkään kaupunkia ollut, joka taisi olla meitä väkevämpi: Herra meidän Jumalamme antoi kaikki meidän allemme.
verses.king_james: From Aroer, which is by the brink of the river of Arnon, and from the city that is by the river, even unto Gilead, there was not one city too strong for us: the Lord our God delivered all unto us:

verses.latin_vulgate: absque terra filiorum Ammon, ad quam non accessimus : et cunctis quæ adjacent torrenti Jeboc, et urbibus montanis, universisque locis, a quibus nos prohibuit Dominus Deus noster.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַ֛ק אֶל־אֶ֥רֶץ בְּנֵי־עַמּ֖וֹן לֹ֣א קָרָ֑בְתָּ כׇּל־יַ֞ד נַ֤חַל יַבֹּק֙ וְעָרֵ֣י הָהָ֔ר וְכֹ֥ל אֲשֶׁר־צִוָּ֖ה יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֵֽינוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Except the land of the children of Ammon, to which we approached not: and all that border upon the torrent Jeboc, and the cities in the mountains, and all the places which the Lord our God forbade us.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan Ammonin lasten maahan et sinä tullut, etkä mihinkään, joka oli Jabbokin ojan tykönä, eikä niihin kaupunkeihin vuorella, taikka johonkuhun muuhun, josta Herra meidän Jumalamme meitä kieltänyt on.
verses.king_james: Only unto the land of the children of Ammon thou camest not, nor unto any place of the river Jabbok, nor unto the cities in the mountains, nor unto whatsoever the Lord our God forbad us.
